prompt: “A realistic classroom filled with many students sitting in rows, most of them wearing similar white uniforms and facing forward attentively. A very small number of students are wearing a different color like red or blue, scattered among the crowd, looking slightly out of place or in a different direction. Natural lighting, realistic proportions, cinematic photography style, shallow depth of field, no text, no symbols, no diagrams.
metaphor: A classroom of uniform students represents a consistent dataset, while a few differently dressed, misaligned students visually stand out as deviations, mapping to statistical outliers in an otherwise uniform distribution.
